findings.fix: Add one canonical story/example per component.
findings.receipt: Agents recreate components they can't see used (Atlassian DESIGN.md experiment).

measure.detail: No examples exist; docs.usage-examples carries the absence.

findings.fix: Correct or delete examples with dead imports.
findings.receipt: Wrong import paths are a documented agent failure mode (Astryx self-checks).

measure.detail: 144/148 exports typecheck from a synthetic package import; unresolved: FormLabel, FormLabelRoot, StepContext, StepperContext

findings.fix: Repair the package types/exports mapping so every public export is importable.
findings.receipt: Wrong import paths are a documented agent failure mode.

measure.detail: 1/1 known-deprecated exports carry @deprecated; missing: none

findings.fix: Add @deprecated to legacy exports.
findings.receipt: Deprecated patterns dominate training data unless current source clearly marks them as deprecated.

measure.detail: 0 agent metadata files found; instruction-manual orientation is not applicable.

findings.fix: Rewrite metadata examples to import the design-system components instead of re-implementing them.
findings.receipt: Re-implementation specs cause agents to recreate components instead of using the system.

measure.detail: 147/148 exported components have documented public props; missing: ClickAwayListener

findings.fix: Add TSDoc descriptions to public props, starting with the most-used components.
findings.receipt: Agents invent props when public prop contracts lack descriptions.

findings.fix: Add when-to-use/when-not sections to component docs.
findings.receipt: Agents must choose components, not just call them (Atlassian recreation finding).

measure.detail: No alternatives/instead component references found; alternatives resolution is not applicable.

findings.fix: Reference real components in alternatives guidance.
findings.receipt: Resolvable cross-references can't be faked by boilerplate.

measure.detail: 0/4 detected confusable pairs reference each other; missing: Button/Link, Checkbox/Switch, Dialog/Popover, RadioGroup/Select

findings.fix: Add mutual "use X instead when..." notes.
findings.receipt: Wrong-component selection is a recurring design-system agent failure mode.

measure.detail: 2 magic values across 226 style LOC (0.885 per 100 LOC); token references: 9; offenders: #fff in src/Paper/Paper.js:10, #fff in src/Paper/Paper.js:12

findings.fix: Replace named hardcoded colors, spacing, and z-index values with token references.
findings.receipt: Agents imitate the system's own styling habits; hardcoded source values become copied output.

measure.detail: 0/0 token sources are present and parseable; invalid: no machine-readable token source found

findings.fix: Publish tokens in a machine-readable format.
findings.receipt: Machine-readable tokens are the theming signal agents can consume.

measure.detail: 1/1 @deprecated marks name a replacement or migration path; missing: none

findings.fix: Append replacement guidance to every @deprecated mark.
findings.receipt: A bare deprecation mark does not redirect an agent away from deprecated training-data gravity.

measure.detail: No manifest found; manifest deprecation signalling is not applicable because agent.manifest-coverage carries the gap.

findings.fix: Tag deprecated entries in the manifest or exclude them from generated agent metadata.
findings.receipt: Manifest-level deprecation signalling keeps deprecated components out of agent-first metadata paths.

measure.detail: 0 agent context files found; dead references: no context file

findings.fix: Regenerate or correct stale component references in agent context files.
findings.receipt: Stale context misleads agents worse than no context.
